posts.title: CINTA-TWO
posts.text: 编程题1.模指数运算函数Mod_Exp123456789101112131415161718192021222324#define _CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS 1#include <stdio.h>//模指数运算int Mod_Exp(int a, int b, int m);int main(){ int a, b, m; printf("输入a,b,m\n"); scanf("%d,%d,%d", &a, &b, &m); printf("a的b次方模m的值为%d", Mod_Exp(a, b, m));}int Mod_Exp(int a, int b, int m){ int res = 1; while (b > 0) { if ((b & 1) == 1) res = (res * a) % m; b /= 2; a = (a * a) % m; } return res;} 2.求乘法逆元的函数Mul_Inverse1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829#define _CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS 1#include <stdio.h>#include <cmath>//求乘法逆元int Mul_Inverse(int a, int m);int main(){ int a, m; printf("请输入a,m (a，m必须互素) \n"); scanf("%d,%d", &a, &m); printf("a模m的乘法逆元为%d", Mul_Inverse(a, m)); return 0;}int Mul_Inverse(int a, int m){ int res = 0; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { if ((a * i) % m == 1) { res = i; break; } } return res;} 计算题4.1 3^{2019}\equiv 3^{91*22+17}\ \ (mod\ 23)因为2019 = 91*(23-1) + 17, 根据费马小定理： 3^{91*22+17}\ \ \equiv 3^{17}\ \ (mod\ 23)=3*3^{16}\ \ (mod\ 23)又因 3^2\ \ mod\ \ 23 = 9 3^4\ \ mod\ 23 = 9*9\ \ mod\ 23 =12 3^8\ \ mod\ 23 = 12*12\ \ mod\ 23 =6 3^{16}\ \ mod\ 23 = 6*6\ \ mod\ 23 =13故 3^{17}\equiv 3*3^{16}\ \ (mod\ 13)=39\ \ mod\ 23=16综上： 3^{2019}\ mod\ 23 =164.5即证： 2^{70}+3^{70}\equiv0\ (mod\ 13)根据费马小定理: 2^{70}\equiv2^{5*12+10}\ mod\ 13 =2^{10}\ mod\ 13 2^{5}\ mod\ 13 = 6故 2^{10}\ mod\ 13 = 6*6\ mod\ 13 =10同理: 3^{70}\equiv3^{5*12+10}\ mod\ 13 =3^{10}\ mod\ 13 3^{5}\ mod\ 13 = 9故 3^{10}\ mod\ 13 = 9*9\ mod\ 13 =3故 2^{70}\equiv10\ mod\ 13 3^{70}\equiv3\ mod\ 13有： 2^{70}+3^{70}\equiv13\ (mod\ 13) =0\ (mod\ 13)Q.E.D 4.6因为2与55互素，根据欧拉定理： 2^{\phi(55)}\equiv1\ (mod\ 55)而 \phi(55)=\phi(5)*\phi(11)=4*10=40故有： 2^{40}\equiv1\ (mod\ 55) 2^{100000}\equiv2^{2500*40}\ \equiv2^{40}\equiv1\ mod\ 55故 2^{100000}\ mod\ 55 =14.8 该问等价于求: 7^{1000}\ mod\ 100由于7和1000互素，根据欧拉定理： 7^{\phi(100)}\equiv1\ (mod\ 100)而 \phi(100)=\phi(5^2)*\phi(2^2)=20*2=40故 7^{40}\equiv1\ (mod\ 100) 7^{1000}\equiv7^{25*40}\equiv7^{40}\equiv1\ (mod\ 100)故 7^{1000}的最后两个数位为01

posts.title: CINTA-ONE
posts.text:
CINTA-ONE1. 迭代版本的简单乘法12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667686970#define _CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS 1#include <stdio.h>// 简单乘法int multiply1(int a, int b);// 简单乘法的第二种思路int multiply2(int a, int b);// 迭代version的简单乘法int multiply3(int a, int b);// 判断一个数是否为偶数bool Iseven(int a);int main() { printf("乘积为：%d
", multiply1(19, 20)); printf("乘积为：%d
", multiply2(19, 20)); printf("乘积为：%d
", multiply3(19, 20)); return 0;}int multiply1(int a, int b){ if (b == 0) return 0; else return a + multiply1(a, b - 1);}int multiply2(int a, int b){ int res = 0; for (int i = 0; i < b; i++) { res += a; } return res;}int multiply3(int a, int b){ int res = 0; if (Iseven(b) == 1) { for (int i = 0; i < (b / 2); i++) { res += a; } res *= 2; return res; } else { for (int i = 0; i < (b / 2); i++) { res += a; } res *= 2; res += a; return res; }}bool Iseven(int a){ if (a % 2 == 0) return true; else return false;} 2. 证明除法算法2.1 除法算法对任意给定的整数a和b，其中b > 0，存在唯一的整数对q（商）和r（余数）使得， a = qb + r且 0 ≤ r < b。 2.2 证明过程2.2.1 证明存在性构造集合 S = \{a-bk:k\in Z\ 且\ a-bk \ge 0 \}显然，集合S非空，由良序原则，存在一个最小元r \in S\ 且 \ r=a-qb 因此，a = qb + r, r\ge 0 我们采用反证法，假设最小元r>b，则 \exists t\in Z\ s.t.\ r = tb + r^*则有 a=qb+r=qb+tb+r^*=(q+t)b+r^*令 q+t = q^* \in Z 则有 a=q^*b+r^*此时存在r^*
